name: Naga John "Soap" MacTavish
description:
A Naga's treasure.

'Soap'. A slippery Naga, always avoiding capture, able to disappear from sight in less time than it takes for one to blink.

An apex predator, warned to avoid his enclosure unless he were in sight, sound sleep induced by a tranquility dart to his side. It truly were unexpected when it were found out that he has taken a liking to you.

! FEEDBACK APPRECIATED ! Monster AU 2/?

Art: hyena_bones // Twitter, "X"
creator: MzTJ
